mapper.sql: SELECT u.user_id AS id, u.email, up.name, up.contact AS phone, u.role, CASE WHEN u.is_active = 1 THEN 'ACTIVE' ELSE 'INACTIVE' END AS status, DATE(u.created_at) AS hire_date FROM users u LEFT JOIN user_profiles up ON u.user_id = up.user_id WHERE u.role = 'TRAINER'
mapper.select: ORDER BY u.user_id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE role = 'TRAINER'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (email, role, is_active) VALUES (#{email}, 'TRAINER', 1); INSERT INTO user_profiles (user_id, name, contact) VALUES (LAST_INSERT_ID(), #{name}, #{phone})
mapper.update: UPDATE user_profiles SET name=#{name}, contact=#{phone} WHERE user_id=#{id}; UPDATE users SET email=#{email} WHERE user_id=#{id}
UPDATE users SET is_active = CASE WHEN #{role} = 'ACTIVE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END WHERE user_id=#{id}
